mrmopt 0.1.0

Interpolate response metrics at an arbitrary spend level

hlpr_opt_metrics.Rd

Uses linear interpolation on the pre-computed `response_df` to obtain KPI, AR, MR, and CP at a given spend value. Avoids re-fitting or re-predicting from the brms model.

Usage

hlpr_opt_metrics(mrm, spend)

Arguments

mrm

An `mrmfit` object with a `$response_df`.

spend

Numeric; the spend value to evaluate at (original units).

Value

A named list with elements `kpi`, `ar`, `mr`, `cp`.
